characters.appearance: Young adult male, muscular build, tan complexion. He has short dark hair with a fade and a neatly trimmed dark beard.
characters.wardrobe: Cream-colored, short-sleeve polo shirt with a textured, waffle-knit pattern. He wears a thin gold chain necklace and a gold bracelet on his right wrist.
characters.demeanor: Earnest, conversational, and slightly exaggerated in his expressions.

characters.appearance: Humanoid robot face with smooth white casing, visible panel seams, and bright blue eyes.
characters.wardrobe: Traditional red and white checkered keffiyeh secured with a black agal.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Interview में कभी मत बोलना "I'm fine, thank you". [Never say "I'm fine, thank you" in an interview.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by pointing out a common English mistake.
- Sets up a relatable scenario (interviews) where English matters.
- Establishes the speaker as a helpful guide.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English बोलना सीखें! (Learn to speak English!)
कभी मत बोलना (Never say)
"I'm fine, thank you".
Supernova

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: I'm fine, thank you.
Character A says: I don't know.
Character A says: You're welcome.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the awkwardness of using robotic, textbook English.
- Visually reinforces incorrect/unnatural phrases with red crosses.
- Builds empathy with the user's struggle to sound natural.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
I'm fine, thank you 🔴
I don't know ❌
You are welcome ❌

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैं भी पहले ऐसे ही अटकता था। [Even I used to get stuck like this before.]
Character A says: फिर मैंने Supernova के साथ practice शुरू की! [Then I started practicing with Supernova!]
Character A says: चलिए दिखाता हूँ। [Let me show you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Transitions from the problem to the solution.
- Character A shares personal experience to build trust.
- Introduces the brand (Supernova) as the turning point.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मैं भी पहले ऐसे ही अटकता था। (Even I used to get stuck like this before.)
फिर मैंने practice शुरू की (Then I started practicing with)
Supernova के साथ!
चलिए दिखाता हूँ (Let me show you)
Supernova

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: नमस्ते! [Hello!]
Character B says: क्या आप भी बिना डरे, confidence के साथ English बोलना चाहते हैं? [Do you also want to speak English with confidence, without fear?]
Character B says: तो Supernova try कीजिए। [Then try Supernova.]
Character B says: ये ऐप आपसे बात करता है, आपकी गलतियाँ सुधारता है, और आपको रोज़मर्रा की English सिखाता है। [This app talks to you, corrects your mistakes, and teaches you everyday English.]
Character B says: चलिए, साथ में practice करते हैं। [Come on, let's practice together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the AI tutor character.
- Explains the core value proposition: interactive speaking practice and real-time correction.
- Sets a warm, encouraging tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
नमस्ते! (Hello!)
क्या आप भी (Do you also)
confidence के साथ (with confidence)
English बोलना चाहते हैं? (want to speak English?)
तो Supernova (Then Supernova)
try कीजिए। (try.)
ये ऐप आपसे बात करता है (This app talks to you)
और आपकी गलतियाँ सुधारता है। (and corrects your mistakes.)
चलिए, (Come on,)
साथ में practice करते हैं। (let's practice together.)
Supernova

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: थोड़ा-थोड़ा। [A little.]
Character B says: Where are you from? [Where are you from?]
Character A says: I am India.
Character B says: Close! सही तरीका है बोलना "I am from India." [Close! The correct way to say it is "I am from India."]
Character A says: यार, मैं हमेशा इसमें अटक जाता हूँ। [Man, I always get stuck on this.]
Character B says: कोई बात नहीं, इसीलिए तो मैं यहाँ हूँ। [No worries, that's why I'm here.]
Character A says: पर क्या ये बहुत महँगा है? [But is it very expensive?]
Character B says: बिल्कुल नहीं! [Not at all!]
Character B says: Supernova के साथ आप बहुत ही कम खर्च में practice कर सकते हैं। [With Supernova you can practice at a very low cost.]
Character B says: महँगे courses की तरह नहीं। [Not like expensive courses.]
Character A says: सच में? [Really?]
Character B says: हाँ! एकदम real-life situations में AI tutor के साथ। [Yes! In completely real-life situations with an AI tutor.]
Character A says: मतलब... interview और office की English भी? [You mean... interview and office English too?]
Character B says: बिल्कुल, ये आपकी grammar और pronunciation सुधारता है ताकि आप confidence से बोल सकें। [Absolutely, it corrects your grammar and pronunciation so you can speak with confidence.]
Character A says: सही है, मैं अभी Supernova download करता हूँ। [That's great, I'll download Supernova right now.]
Character B says: बहुत बढ़िया! चलिए English बोलना शुरू करें। [Awesome! Let's start speaking English.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows the app in action via a simulated conversation.
- Addresses the user's fear of making mistakes and cost concerns.
- Highlights key features: grammar correction, pronunciation, and real-life scenarios like interviews.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Do you speak English?
थोड़ा-थोड़ा। (A little.)
Where are you from?
I am India. ❌
Close! सही तरीका है बोलना (Close! The correct way to say it is)
"I am from India."
यार, मैं हमेशा इसमें अटक जाता हूँ। (Man, I always get stuck on this.)
कोई बात नहीं, इसीलिए तो मैं यहाँ हूँ। (No worries, that's why I'm here.)
पर क्या ये बहुत महँगा है? (But is it very expensive?)
बिल्कुल नहीं! (Not at all!)
Supernova के साथ आप बहुत ही (With Supernova you can practice at a)
कम खर्च में practice कर सकते हैं। (very low cost.)
महँगे courses की तरह नहीं। (Not like expensive courses.)
सच में? (Really?)
हाँ! एकदम real-life situations में (Yes! In completely real-life situations)
AI tutor के साथ। (with an AI tutor.)
मतलब... interview और office की English भी? (You mean... interview and office English too?)
बिल्कुल, ये आपकी grammar और pronunciation सुधारता है (Absolutely, it corrects your grammar and pronunciation)
ताकि आप confidence से बोल सकें। (so you can speak with confidence.)
सही है, मैं अभी Supernova download करता हूँ। (That's great, I'll download Supernova right now.)

Supernova

- Displays app store badges for credibility.
- Leaves a clear next step for the user.
